content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based selloff: Nifty -1.44%, Bank Nifty -1.53%, PSU Bank -2.22%, Metals -2.11%, Auto -1.76%, Realty -1.99%. India VIX +9.81% to 19.15 — risk-off intensifying. Crude shock + INR weakness + Hormuz disruption are the drivers. Defensive pockets (FMCG, Pharma, Energy upstream) holding. Priority is risk management on the existing book, not new aggressive entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23700,
      "nifty_resistance": 24050
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.88,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD-equivalent. Current SL 1029.88 is already ~0.7% below CMP 1037.75 — correctly trailed. Stock consolidating after +5.4% move; Q4 already printed (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA 0.93%). No new MODIFY needed; stored values stand. (No-op signaled — keeping HOLD in position_actions instead.)"
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold in consolidation after April peak; -2.5% unrealized but within SL of 119. With VIX +10% and risk-off intensifying, gold hedge thesis intact. SL at 119 (~2.5% below CMP) is appropriate. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1442.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +2.7%, SL already at 1442 (above entry 1412.94 — already trailed to lock breakeven+). FMCG defensive holding well in selloff. Stored SL is appropriate; no new tightening needed without giving up room (CMP 1454.80, SL 1442 = ~0.9% away, already tight). Treat as HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1762.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.1%, current SL 1762 already locks small gain (entry 1734). CMP 1774.50 ~0.7% above SL — already tight. Raising target slightly to 1830 to reflect Organon-deal momentum (52w high 1851 nearby). SL stays — appropriate distance to LTP."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "new_target": 500.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.7%, SL 478 already above entry 469 (locked gain). CMP 482.40 only ~0.9% above SL. Stock near 52w high after Q4 beat (PAT +11.4%, dividend ₹26.75 FY26). Stored values appropriate; no further tightening — would risk noise stop-out. HOLD-equivalent."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.2% but stock had Q4 beat (+68% PAT) and rallied +9.8% today. SL 195 is appropriate (~0.6% below CMP). No change needed. The 0-day held flag suggests entry was today; let position breathe."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2410.00,
      "new_target": 2580.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.2%, current SL 2410 above CMP 2404 — flush/above LTP, violates trail-gap discipline (SL above LTP = self-stop on next downtick). However, MODIFY can only TIGHTEN. SL 2410 is current; cannot loosen. This indicates the position is essentially already stopped on any tick at/below 2410. Letting stored SL stand; effectively will exit on next print at SL. No further action — treating as HOLD with awareness that stop is at risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.3%, SL 290 (~3.7% below CMP 301.20). Brent at $120 + Hormuz disruption + 52w high momentum still intact. Position size small enough that wider SL is acceptable. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 110,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock down -4.49% today (CMP 441.05). Q4 results May 12 = binary catalyst within ~8 trading sessions; Q3 PAT was -25% YoY raising bar. Position currently -0.3%, near breakeven — clean exit before binary event consistent with binary-event discipline (rule 11). Energy sector cluster discipline: also holding ONGC, COALINDIA, CHENNPETRO — trimming TATAPOWER reduces cluster concentration. Exit at market."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CHENNPETRO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.3%, SL 1075 (~3.7% below CMP 1116.60). Q4 already printed (PAT +203%, GRM $13.75). OMC refinery-price-freeze overhang is the key risk but no binary catalyst within 3 days. Wide SL appropriate given small position. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1029.88 already trailed above entry; ~0.7% below CMP — appropriate. No-op MODIFY avoided."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Gold hedge intact in risk-off environment. SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1442 already above entry 1412.94 (locked +2% min). FMCG defensive working."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1762 above entry 1734; Organon-deal momentum intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 478 above entry 469; near 52w high post Q4 beat."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat already printed; let position breathe within current SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 2410 essentially flush with CMP — at risk of stop-out on next downtick. Cannot loosen. Will let market resolve."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Brent $120 + Hormuz tailwind intact. SL 290 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results May 12 = binary event within ~8 sessions. Stock -4.49% today. Exit near breakeven ahead of binary risk; also reduces energy-cluster concentration."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CHENNPETRO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 already printed; no immediate binary catalyst. Hold within SL."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BANDHANBNK Q4 beat very strong (+68% PAT, NIM 6.2%, GNPA improving) — already held, monitor for add on consolidation post the +9.8% gap. CANHLIFE strong Q4 VNB margin 30.4% but small float and PSU control overhang — pass for now. PIRAMALFIN large volume but profit quality concerns (one-off imaging gain) + stretched P/E ~41x at ATH — pass. EMCURE near 52w high with Q4 results May 5 = binary risk in 3 sessions — no entry. BANDHANBNK already in book is the cleanest expression of the bank-earnings-beat theme. CHENNPETRO already held covers the refining-margin theme.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Risk-off day: Nifty -1.44%, VIX +10%. Book is heavily exposed already (60% deployed across 10 names). Priority is defending winners and removing binary-event risk (TATAPOWER exit). Pharma cluster: SUNPHARMA + GLENMARK = 2 names, manageable. Energy cluster: ONGC + COALINDIA + CHENNPETRO + (exiting TATAPOWER) = 3 active = at cluster threshold, no new energy adds. Financial cluster: PNBHOUSING + BANDHANBNK = 2 names, tolerable. The PHARMABEES OPEN order from earlier (~76 hrs ago) needs review — given GLENMARK+SUNPHARMA already provide pharma exposure and PHARMABEES would extend cluster, consider letting it expire/cancel; but per current scope keeping order discipline by not adding a third pharma layer via fresh action this tick. NO new BUY entries today — environment too volatile and book already at adequate deployment. Cumulative P&L still slightly negative; defending what we have is the right play."
}
